_meta: Comic entity schema — based on discovery analysis (16 sampled comics)

columns._meta: Fields are grouped by purpose. 'nullable' means the field is not present on all comics.

wiki_page_title.description: Original wiki page title — used as the unique key for upserts (e.g., 'Amazing_Spider-Man_Vol_1_300')

image_url.description: Full CDN URL for the primary cover image, resolved from wiki Image1 field via MediaWiki imageinfo API

story_title.description: Title of the primary story (e.g., 'Venom', 'Behold... The Vision!')

synopsis.description: Full synopsis of the primary story — can be very long (2000-7000+ characters)

story_arc.description: Named story arc this issue belongs to (e.g., 'The Beginning of the End')
story_arc.frequency: 1/10 — rare but high value for grouping

storyline.description: Named storyline this issue belongs to (e.g., 'Demon in a Bottle')
storyline.frequency: 1/10 — rare but high value for grouping

writer.description: Writer(s) — newline-separated if multiple (merged from Writer1_1, Writer1_2, etc.)

editor_in_chief.description: Editor-in-Chief at time of publication (e.g., 'Tom DeFalco', 'Stan Lee')

cover_artists.description: Primary cover artist(s) — newline-separated (merged from Image1_Artist1 through Image1_Artist5)

appearing.description: Characters, teams, locations, and items appearing in the issue — structured text, will feed join tables

notes.description: Continuity notes, chronology annotations, and editorial comments

trivia.description: Interesting facts about the issue — publication history, real-world context

marvel_unlimited_id.description: Marvel Unlimited digital ID — useful for cross-referencing with Marvel's official platform

variant_covers.description: JSON array of variant covers: [{image_url, artists, text}, ...] — resolved from Image2-5 fields. Null if no variants.

dropped_fields._meta: Fields from discovery that are intentionally excluded from the schema
dropped_fields.previous_issue: Redundant — series entity + joins handle reading order
dropped_fields.next_issue: Redundant — series entity + joins handle reading order
dropped_fields.story_title_2: Secondary story title — rare (1/10), niche anthology content
dropped_fields.reprint_of_2: Reprint reference for secondary story — rare (1/10)
dropped_fields.links: External reference links — not structured data

relationships._meta: These will be handled by join tables — defined separately after all entity schemas are finalized
relationships.character_comics: From Appearing field → join table with role (featured/supporting/antagonist)
relationships.comic_series: Foreign key to series table — which series this issue belongs to
relationships.comic_events: Join table — which events this issue ties into
